body:
closes #1298 - Instead of using hard code values for the constructor, this allows the user to modify a TOML file instead if they want to change the parameters. Furthermore, this should simplify the code needed for the forward model for calibration as it is much easier to change parameter values.

## Limitations

- Due to how ClimaParams is implemented, all the name of the parameter values must be different.
- If there are constructors that takes in different number of parameters, it might be difficult to work with using ClimaParams.
title: Use ClimaParams instead of hardcoding values

## Purpose 
This PR moves the optimality model of Smith et al - the Pmodel encompasses aspects of that model (Ac = Aj) but also predicts stomatal conductance. The recommendation is to use the Pmodel instead of the Smith model. 

(@ychnli for visibility)

title: Use distributed when making docs
